inline_comments.message: Please do provide the NodePort value in the service template, using helm. Refer to https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/OOM+NodePort+List to find available NodePort. Thanks

I should have paid more attention to the wiki page, I didn't see these 311 prefix getting used.
You should use either 302 or 304 for prefix, please.

The value nodePortPrefix is usually the same all accross the board, which is 302. We have another placeholder, which is nodePortPrefixExt holding value 304.

The conviniency of having those two consistent accross ONAP is that you can override them at one place, and it gets propagated, as it belongs to the 'global' config.

If you could get a port in the 302 or 304 range, depending on whether this is an internal ONAP port and a port for external communication, that would be great.

Thanks

Thank you for your comment.

The bottom of the 302 array on the wiki page mislead me into thinking that 311 prefix was used.

I'll use the 304 prefix, port 00 (so 30400), with the .nodePortPrefixExt value.
changing nodePortPrefix here to 311 is confusing.
changing nodePortPrefix here to 311 is confusing.
